reasoning: The Polymarket price for this market was 0.02 on November 13, 2025, strongly indicating that betting markets do not expect an Alibaba model to hold the #1 spot by the end of the year. Our search found that Alibaba's latest major model, Qwen3-Max-Instruct, was released in late September 2025 and debuted at #3 on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard. While this is an impressive showing, climbing those final spots to surpass the absolute best models from OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google typically requires a major generative leap. By November 2025, there are no credible expectations or announcements of a new Qwen version within the next five weeks that could easily vault them to the #1 position. Although the tie-breaker rule heavily favors Alibaba (due to alphabetical sorting), the fundamental gap between #3 and #1 makes their overall chances very low. Therefore, my forecast is highly aligned with the market estimate, at 3%.
